category_sources: source_facts.description says it waits for events on files or directories on macOS; kqwait name and repository are specific to that utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kqwait; official repository is named sschober/kqwait.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sschober/kqwait; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions macOS file and directory events; project name kqwait indicates kqueue-based waiting.
